description: MCP server for Shiori bookmark management and tag workflows.
name: io.github.rusty4444/shiori-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the Shiori instance, e.g. https://shiori.example.com
environmentVariables.name: SHIORI_BASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: Existing Shiori session id; skips login if provided
environmentVariables.name: SHIORI_SESSION_ID

environmentVariables.description: Shiori username; required unless SHIORI_SESSION_ID is set
environmentVariables.name: SHIORI_USERNAME

environmentVariables.description: Shiori password; required unless SHIORI_SESSION_ID is set
environmentVariables.name: SHIORI_PASSWORD

title: Shiori MCP
